title: senecio astephanus
intro: Senecio astephanus, also known as Mountain Ragwort or Western Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio astephanus include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Senecio astephanus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
